name: obsidian-group-enhancer-for-bases
description: Provides enhanced features for grouped views in Obsidian Bases.

scripts.test: rm -rf .tmp-test && node node_modules/typescript/lib/tsc.js -p test/tsconfig.json && node --test $(find .tmp-test/test -type f -name '*.test.js' | sort)
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: TfTHacker
